title: Navachethana Hospital - Best Multispeciality Hospital you can trust
description: Navachethana Hospital, a unit of Pan Asia Hospital Pvt Ltd, is one of the best-known Multispeciality Hospitals in North Bengaluru. We are conveniently located, on the way from Kempegowda International Airport to the Bengaluru city. Our position in Yelahanka Newtown is like a gateway to Bengaluru city.
text:
Navachethana Hospital - Best Multispeciality Hospital you can trust Monday - Sunday, 365 Days, 24X7, 52 Weeks a year Call us now +91-80-42480000 / 9880925495 Home About Services Departments Doctors Medical Tourism Contact Your Neighborhood Hospital Navachethana, your best neighborhood Multispeciality Hospital. Emergency & Accident Care A multidisciplinary team of doctors, nurses, paramedics, and technicians who are trained and equipped to handle all kinds of medical emergencies. 24/7 Pharmacy Complete range of medicines and health products, timely medicine access for emergencies, chronic conditions and well-trained pharmacists. Advanced Laboratory Highly qualified technicians, advanced and automated equipments, home collection service, web-based reporting systems, critical alerts via SMS Advanced Radiology Sophisticated imaging techniques and technologies. CT Scan, Ultrasonography, Interventional Radiological Procedures, Digital X-ray, NST(Pre-natal Non-stress test). In an emergency? Need help now? Call: +91-80-42480040 About Us Navachethana Hospital, a unit of Pan Asia Hospital Pvt Ltd, is one of the best-known Multispeciality Hospitals in North Bengaluru. We are conveniently located, on the way from Kempegowda International Airport to the Bengaluru city. Our position in Yelahanka Newtown is like a gateway to Bengaluru city. Transformation is here.. We know you. We care for you. We’re with you. Your health is our top priority. VISION: To be the centre of excellence in patient care and most trusted for personalized patient care. MISSION: To improve the health of the people and communities we serve. We are a 100 beds Hospital, with State of the art diagnostic facilities, modern operation theatres, well-manned ICU beds, 
              spacious inpatient facilities and very easily accessible Out - patient facilities. Read More We have a 24 hour, 365 days functioning Emergency care and Pharmacy. We also focus on Rehabilitation & Physiotherapy 
                  facilities, Nutrition, and diet with a focus on both acute and long term care. We step up our services to ensure Homecare and accessibility (Ambulance services) is such 
                  that support for patients and their carers are always seamless. Our experienced team of Healthcare Professionals always strives to offer compassionate and globally standardized care. Our Doctors and Consultants are experienced and highly skilled. 
                  They do not rest with the expertise they already have, but keep working to improve themselves. 
                  Navachethana Hospital constantly encourages its nursing staff and allied staff to go through mandatory and optional trainings, 
                  so that they keep up skilling themselves. Specialists to inspire you and make you realize your health is all you have. Find out more » Services Smile, our medical services converge to achieve optimal health. Find out more » Out Patient Consulting Suites designed for holistic and patient-centered care. Find out more » NABH accreditation, committed & dedicated to providing the best care. Find out more » 24/7 Ambulance Facility We provide 24X7 ambulance services, ensuring swift and reliable medical transportation when needed. Insurance Services We have dedicated insurance facilitation team to assist you in navigating insurance claims and reimbursements seamlessly. Ancillary Services We offer a wide range of ancillary services to support your overall well-being including Chemotherapy, Ultrasound / CT Scan/ Digital X Ray, ECG/2D Echo/TMT, Pulmonary function test/bronchoscopy, Endoscopy/Colonoscopy/ERCP, EEG/ENMG/NCS/VEP, Dialysis, Audiometry/Speech Therapy and New born OAE Screening. Dedicated Patient Relationship Team We are committed to creating a compassionate and supportive environment where patients feel valued, heard, and cared. Services Emergency Care We have a 24 hour, 365 days functioning unit, which is equipped to provide Emergency Care. Outpatient Care Our Outpatient department includes services such as consultations, diagnostic tests, minor procedures, rehabilitation, vaccinations and immunizations and many more.. Inpatient Care With the best care and technology we ensure that patients receive the right care. Our facilities include basic wards to deluxe suites to meet patients comfort during their hospital stay. Intensive Care Unit (ICU) ICU's are well designed for patients with severe or life-threatening illnesses or injuries that require well-trained specialists and monitoring with specialized equipments. Operation Theatre Our OTs are designed to perform all surgical procedures at the highest level of care and safety. We ensure every patient's safety by following the best protocol. Labour Room Our spacious and airy labour room with understanding and empathetic staff always ensures the best experience for our patients. Dialysis We provide comprehensive dialysis services in a supportive and comfortable environment. Our state-of art facilities are equipped with dialysis machines and technology to ensure efficient and safe treatment. Physiotherapy Our Physiotherapy facility is equipped with advanced quality equipments. We offer a wide range of sevices, including personalized treatment plans that are tailored to your specific needs. Clinical Nutrition Care Our Clinical nutrition care involves designing and implementing nutrition plans to support patients with the necessary vitamins, proteins, minerals, and nutrients their bodies need for various health situations.. Departments General Medicine and Surgery | Orthopaedics | Obstetrics & Gynecology | Paediatrics and Pediatric Surgery | Ear Nose Throat (ENT) | Opthalmology General Medicine and Surgery General Medicine and General Surgery. Orthopaedics Orthopaedics,Spine and Rheumatology. Obstetrics and Gynecology OBG and Reproductive Medicine. Pediatrics Pediatrics and Pediatric Surgery. Ear Nose Throat (ENT) Ear, nose, throat, neck and head. Opthalmology Opthalmology. General Medicine and Surgery We offer a comprehensive range of services, including preventive care, diagnostic testing, and treatment for chronic and acute medical conditions. We also provide full range of surgical services, from open surgeries to Emergency surgeries, ensuring the finest possible outcome for each individual patient. General Medicine Services: Routine Health Check-ups, Diagnosis and Treatment, Chronic Disease Management, Vaccinations and Preventive Care, Wellness and Lifestyle Guidance, Infectious Disease Management, Acute Illness Care and Geriatric Care General Surgery Services: Minimally Invasive Procedures, Gastrointestinal Surgery, Breast Surgery, Thyroid and Parathyroid Surgery, Skin Lesion and Mole Removal, Appendectomy, Colon and Rectal Surgery and Emergency Surgical Care Orthopaedics Orthopedics deals with the management of aliments of the musculoskeletal system. The musculoskeletal system comprises the body’s structure and the mechanics that make it work. Doctors in this field specialize in diagnosing, treating, and treating conditions affecting the bones, joints, muscles, tendons, ligaments, cartilage, and nerves in patients of all ages, from newborn babies to the elderly. At Navachethana Hospital, our excellent team of orthopedic surgeons is adept at confronting the toughest disorders and conditions related to bones and the spine. They provide the right approach to expedite your swift recovery, ensuring that you regain to move freely at the earliest. Orthopaedics Facilities and Services: - Trauma, fracture management and surgery. - Joint replacement surgeries including Total hip,, Total knee, Total shoulder and total elbow arthtoplasty. - Sports injuries including arthroscopic ligament reconstruction of knee, ankle, shoulder, shoulder stabilization and rotator cuff repair. - Joint preserving surgeries such as osteotomies and realignment, biologics and cartilage repair. - Spine surgery such as discectomy, stabilization and deformity correction. Obstetrics and Gynecology Our dedicated team of professionals is here to support you through every stage of your reproductive health journey, from adolescence to pregnancy and beyond. Our Services: - Routine - Womens health check up - Family planning - Prenatal care - Labour and Delivery - Gynec Services (Menopause & menstrual, PCOD, White discharge) - Minimally Invasive Procedures/Surgeries - Counselling and Education Pediatrics Our Pediatric services are designed to provide comprehensive medical care for infants, children, and adolescents. Our Services: - Child-Centered Care - Vaccination and Immunization - Wellness and Preventive Care - Acute and Chronic Conditions - Developmental Support - Parental Education/Guidance Ear Nose Throat (ENT) ENT services at Navachethana hospital, cover a wide range of medical conditions related general ENT care, audiology, pediatric ENT, head and neck surgery, rhinology and laryngology. Our Services: - Hearing Care - Breathing Care/Breathing Easy - Throat Care - Comprehensive Care Opthalmology We offer a comprehensive range of services, including preventive care, diagnostic testing, and treatment for chronic and acute medical conditions. Also full range of surgical services, from open surgeries to emergencies surgeries providing the finest possible outcome for each individual patient. Our Services: - Comprehensive Eye Exams - Vision Correction - Cataract Evaluation and Surgery - Glaucoma Management - Vitero - Retinal Care - Eye Infections and Emergencies - Pediatric Eye Care - Eyelid and Ocular Surface Disorders - Surgical services - Spectacle and Contact Lens Dispensing Service About Us Navachethana Hospital, a unit of Pan Asia Hospital Pvt Ltd, is one of the best-known Multispeciality Hospitals in North Bengaluru. Our healthcare facility is designed to feel a little more like home. How to get here Call us @ +91 98809925495 Schedule an appointment Medical review and treatment plan Estimated cost of the treatment Confirmation and travel itinerary advise Read more.. What to bring Your Previous Medical Records Valid Insurance documents Valid Passport . . Read more.. What to expect Assistance for Boarding and Lodging Treatment as advised Dedicated patient coordinator Providing Language translator Special dietary advise Read more.. Insurance & financial support Assistance in currency exchange Insurance and billing assistance Easy payment options . . Read more.. What’s on your mind? Frequently Asked Questions - Global patients What are the modes of payment? We accept various payment method. At the time of admission payments can be made through credit /debit cards/ cash. Payment can also be transferred to Hospital Account through wire transfer. What medical specialties we offer for international patients? We offer a wide range of medical specialties and advanced treatment. Please refer to services section on the website for detailed information. Can I get Medical VISA assistance? Depending on the country of origin and duration of stay, you may require medical visa. Our team can assist you the visa application process by providing necessary documents. Does Navachethana Hospital assist for travel and accommodation? Yes, we offer assistance with travel arrangements, including flight booking, transportation to and from the hospital. We also recommend nearby accommodations and also assist with reservation to make your stay comfortable. Does hospital arrange for Airport pick up? Yes, Our International Patient service team will share the name and contact details of the person who is designated to pick up from the airport. How can I stay connected with my family during my treatment? We understand the importance of emotional support. Internet access is provide for all the international patients to stay connected with your loved ones and family members. What happens after discharge/treatment? Your well- being is our paramount concern, we offer telemedicine consultations post treatment and discharge. Our team will provide continuous support to monitor your recovery. Any testimonials available from international patients who have received treatment? Yes, we feature success stories and testimonial from international patients who have experienced successful treatment at our hospital. Contact We are conveniently located with good road connections to highways, Yelahanka Railway station and on the way from Kempegowda International Airport to the Bengaluru city. Our position in Yelahanka Newtown is like a gateway to Bengaluru city and we always welcome our patrons to exploit us. Our Address 17/A2, 3rd B Cross Road, A-Sector, Yelahanka New Town.
